body:
## Problem

`/drummers` is consistently the **#2 organic page** (10 views/7d in GA4, 10 users). It already has:
- ✅ CollectionPage + ItemList JSON-LD (shipped #1069)
- ✅ SSR title + description

But it has **no FAQPage schema** → not eligible for AI Overview appearances.

## Fix

Add `articleSchema` with FAQPage to the `/drummers` SSR handler in `api/meta/[...path].js`.

Find the handler for `path === '/drummers'` and add:

```javascript
articleSchema: JSON.stringify({
  '@context': 'https://schema.org',
  '@type': 'FAQPage',
  mainEntity: [
    {
      '@type': 'Question',
      name: 'Who are the best metal drummers of all time?',
      acceptedAnswer: {
        '@type': 'Answer',
        text: 'The greatest metal drummers include Joey Jordison (Slipknot), Dave Lombardo (Slayer), Gene Hoglan (Death/Testament), George Kollias (Nile), and Lars Ulrich (Metallica). MetalForge profiles 60+ professional metal drummers with complete gear breakdowns.',
      }
    },
    {
      '@type': 'Question',
      name: 'What drums do metal drummers use?',
      acceptedAnswer: {
        '@type': 'Answer',
        text: 'Most metal drummers use double bass drum kits from brands like Tama, DW (DW Drums), Pearl, and Ludwig. Popular cymbal brands include Zildjian, Meinl, Sabian, and Paiste. Many metal drummers use 22-24" bass drums for a deeper sound.',
      }
    },
    {
      '@type': 'Question',
      name: 'How can I find out what gear a metal drummer uses?',
      acceptedAnswer: {
        '@type': 'Answer',
        text: 'MetalForge provides complete gear breakdowns for 60+ metal drummers including drums, cymbals, pedals, hardware, sticks, and endorsements. Visit any drummer profile page for their full setup.',
      }
    },
  ],
}),
```

## Files to Touch

- `api/meta/[...path].js` — the `path === '/drummers'` handler (locate by searching for "/drummers")

## Quality Gate

- `curl -s https://metalforge.io/api/meta/drummers | jq '.articleSchema' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d['@type'])"` → "FAQPage"
- 3 Q&A pairs present
- FAQPage nests correctly alongside existing CollectionPage in the page's JSON-LD

Note: CollectionPage and FAQPage can both be emitted — they are separate schema types. CollectionPage is in the client-side rendering (#1069); FAQPage can be in the SSR response as `articleSchema`.

## Estimated Uplift

FAQPage eligibility for the #2 organic page. Targets "best metal drummers", "what drums do metal drummers use?" AI Overview queries that drive branded awareness and traffic.

## Done

- [ ] FAQPage JSON-LD present in SSR response for /drummers
- [ ] 3+ Q&A pairs included
- [ ] Rich Results Test passes FAQPage validation
title: SEO: /drummers hub — add FAQPage JSON-LD for AI Overview eligibility (#2 organic page)
